The '''Wookiee Side-Arm''',{{Fact}} also known as the '''Wookiee Blaster Pistol''', was a model of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]<ref name="BftG" /> was mass-produced by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] workshops across the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The pistol featured a [[Bronzium/Legends|bronzium]]-alloy blast suppressor.<ref name="VD" />
